items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Quarterly WordPress Threat Intelligence Report  Q1 2026
id: 04c8cedb-83dd-5477-8f18-7a7b7ca3ff5e
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Quarterly WordPress Threat Intelligence Report  Q1 2026 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: GENERIC
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Quarterly WordPress Threat Intelligence Report  Q1 2026
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/06
modified: 2026/06/06
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access
    - Service account activity
level: low
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Quarterly WordPress Threat Intelligence Report  Q1 2026 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-06T07:32:05Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "Quarterly WordPress Threat Intelligence Report  Q1 2026", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Quarterly WordPress Threat Intelligence Report  Q1 2026 Exploitation Attempt - GENERIC"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5398727; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-06, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Weekly Metasploit Update Apache ActiveMQ RCE Gogs Rebase RCE and Windows Kernel 
id: c2edd71e-9746-5581-8fd2-0264cb8d5b1d
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to Weekly Metasploit Update: Apache ActiveMQ RCE, Gogs Rebase RCE, and Windows Kernel Pointer Enum (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: MEDIUM | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/Weekly Metasploit Update: Apache ActiveMQ RCE, Gogs Rebase RCE, and Windows Kernel Pointer Enum
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/06
modified: 2026/06/06
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: medium
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — Weekly Metasploit Update: Apache ActiveMQ RCE, Gogs Rebase RCE, and Windows Kernel Pointer Enum Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-06T07:32:05Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "Weekly Metasploit Update: Apache ActiveMQ RCE, Gogs Rebase RCE, and Windows Kernel Pointer Enum", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX Weekly Metasploit Update: Apache ActiveMQ RCE, Gogs Rebase RCE, and Windows Kernel Pointer Enum Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:6213282; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-06, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] Remote Code Execution - low severity (Risk 4.14/10). EPSS 66.76% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1059, T1548, T1190 (3 techniques). 19 indicators detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-APT-29. AI confidence: MODERATE (42%) - partial intelligence corroboration.

items.title: CISA Warns of SolarWinds Serv-U Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks
items.description:
The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added a critical SolarWinds Serv-U vulnerability to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, warning that threat actors are actively exploiting the flaw in the wild. Tracked as CVE-2026-28318, the vulnerability affects SolarWinds Serv-U file transfer software and enables unauthenticated attackers to crash the service through specially […] 
 The post  CISA Warns of SolarWinds Serv-U Vulnerability Exploited in Attacks  appear
